name: Amazon Order Export
description: Exports your Amazon order history to a downloadable spreadsheet for record keeping, expense tracking, or returns management.
author: ocbot-community

name: GitHub PR Review Helper
description: Summarizes pull request changes and posts a structured review comment on GitHub with file-level diffs and issue flagging.
author: ocbot-community

name: LinkedIn Smart Connect
description: Sends personalized connection requests from LinkedIn people search results with customizable message templates and rate limiting.
author: networking-pro
